title: Orders In!
summary: TLDR: Ordered parts, waiting on it to arrive...
body:
Just a quick initial update on the board.\
All the necessary orders have officially been placed through JLCPCB, DigiKey, and Amazon.

I’ve already received the DigiKey components, but the JLCPCB order is naturally taking a little longer to account for the actual board production time and overseas shipping.

Assuming the shipping estimates hold up, assembly should kick off this coming weekend. From there, I can finally dive right into board bring-up and testing.

More updates coming soon!
